parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH wb_codes AS (
    SELECT p.id, p.code, p.used_count, p.max_uses, p.discount_value, p.created_at,
           p.valid_until
    FROM promocodes p
    WHERE p.code LIKE 'WB%'
      AND p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  ),
  usages AS (
    SELECT pu.promocode_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT pu.user_id) as unique_redeemers,
           COUNT(*) as uses,
           SUM(pu.discount_amount)/100.0 as discount_given_eur,
           MIN(pu.created_at)::date as first_redemption
    FROM promocode_usages pu
    WHERE pu.promocode_id IN (SELECT id FROM wb_codes)
    GROUP BY pu.promocode_id
  ),
  redemption_orders AS (
    SELECT pu.user_id, o.id as order_id, o.total_amount, o.created_at,
           pu.promocode_id
    FROM promocode_usages pu
    JOIN orders o ON o.id = pu.order_id
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web'
      AND pu.promocode_id IN (SELECT id FROM wb_codes)
  )
  SELECT 
    'totals' as section,
    json_build_object(
      'codes_created', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wb_codes),
      'codes_redeemed', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT promocode_id) FROM usages),
      'unique_redeemers', (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM redemption_orders),
      'redemption_orders', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM redemption_orders),
      'discount_given_eur', COALESCE((SELECT SUM(discount_given_eur) FROM usages)::int, 0),
      'redemption_gmv_eur', COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_amount)/100.0)::int FROM redemption_orders), 0),
      'conversion_pct', CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wb_codes) = 0 THEN 0
                             ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT promocode_id) FROM usages) 
                                   / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wb_codes),0), 1) END
    ) as data
) t

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  -- Кто вернулся после выдачи промокода (в том числе без него)
  -- Только для юзеров, которым выдан промокод WB* за последние 30 дней
  WITH wb_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT pu.user_id, MIN(p.created_at) as code_issued_at
    FROM promocodes p
    JOIN promocode_usages pu ON pu.promocode_id = p.id
    WHERE p.code LIKE 'WB%' AND p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY pu.user_id
  ),
  returns AS (
    SELECT 
      wu.user_id,
      COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.created_at >= wu.code_issued_at) as orders_after,
      SUM(o.total_amount) FILTER (WHERE o.created_at >= wu.code_issued_at)/100.0 as gmv_after
    FROM wb_users wu
    LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = wu.user_id 
      AND o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
    GROUP BY wu.user_id
  )
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as users_with_promo,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE orders_after > 0) as users_returned,
    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(gmv_after)::numeric), 0) as total_gmv_after
  FROM returns
) t
